name: The Royal Game of Ur
author: Abstract Games factory
description: The Royal Game of Ur (the Game of Twenty Squares): the ~4500-year-old Mesopotamian race game in Irving Finkel's reconstructed rules. Roll four tetrahedral dice (0-4) and race seven pieces up your private arm, along the shared central lane, and off the far end. Land on a rosette for safety and an extra turn; catch an enemy on the shared lane to send it home. First to bear all seven off wins.
